name_en: Top-tier replica M24206 This Speedy Bandouliere 25 bag is crafted from soft lambskin leather, featuring a diamond quilting pattern for a visual impact. It is accented with glossy metal hardware and a classic key pouch. The embossed leather handle and detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap upgrade the carrying experience. Dimensions: 25 × 19 × 15 cm
